name: ASUS ROG STRIX X870E-E GAMING WIFI ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 1x PCIe 5.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 4.0 x16 - Support DDR5-8000+(OC) - 5x M.2 Slots - 2x USB4 Type-C - HDMI 2.1 - Realtek 5Gb LAN - Optical S/PDIF out - 802.11be 2x2 Wi-Fi 7 - Bluetooth 5.4
shortName: ASUS ROG STRIX X870E-E GAMING WIFI ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 1x
description: High-end ROG STRIX ATX motherboard for AM5 socket with PCIe 5.0, dual USB4, and WiFi 7.
